title: Validate external adopter repository over a long cycle
outOfScope: Enterprise identity, permissions, audit immutability, or compliance certification.
Publishing to an external adopter repository or claiming provider-hosted evidence.
Changing installation semantics for real adopters.

sources.reason: Deterministic isolated adopter repository lifecycle harness.
Lifecycle, upgrade, rollback, PR, and cleanup regression coverage.
Evidence boundary and independent repository validation guidance.

riskAssessment.reason: A local isolated Git repository provides deterministic long-cycle evidence without external provider claims.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized serial execution and this is bounded repository validation.

preReviewWarnings: Review that the harness evidence is independent-worktree evidence and is not presented as enterprise assurance.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: An isolated Git adopter repository and independent worktree execute install, upgrade, rollback, PR, merge, and branch cleanup lifecycle steps.
Evidence records default branch, remote, baseline commit, PR/merge, and cleanup results with no fabricated provider evidence.
Tests cover successful lifecycle and fail-closed cleanup or missing evidence cases.
Documentation states the boundary between controlled adopter validation and enterprise identity, authorization, audit, or compliance claims.
guidelines: Keep lifecycle evidence deterministic, local, and reproducible.
Never present a controlled fixture as an enterprise assurance or external-provider result.
Fail closed when required Git lifecycle evidence is missing.

intent.problem: The repository has fixture evidence but lacks a long-cycle adopter validation that proves installation, upgrade, rollback, PR, and cleanup evidence in an independent Git repository.
constraints: Use a temporary isolated repository and worktree; do not mutate external repositories.
Record observable local Git evidence only.
Keep enterprise identity, permissions, audit, and compliance claims explicitly out of scope.
intent.rationale: A reproducible local adopter harness makes the template lifecycle boundary testable while keeping unsupported enterprise claims fail closed.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: independent repository install and baseline commit
upgrade and rollback in an independent worktree
PR merge and local/remote branch cleanup evidence

rawUserRequest: 继续，循环到所有任务全部完成，中途不要停。

declaredIntent.summary: Validate a local adopter repository over an independent long lifecycle.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized continuous execution of the serial remediation plan.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
